blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text or important document areas.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles that distort text or cause information loss.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off, and the image frame includes all important document portions.

missing_sections.description: No parts of the receipt/invoice are missing, incomplete, or not captured in the image.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements block or obscure document content.

classification.error_message: The document text is unreadable and does not contain any recognizable expense-related fields.
classification.reasoning: The provided document text is not readable and does not contain any of the required fields to be classified as an expense document. The text appears to be corrupted or incomplete.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: None of the required fields for expense identification were found in the document.

issues.description: Missing mandatory supplier name on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Name of the vendor or merchant must be visible on the receipt

issues.description: Total amount of the expense is missing on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Total amount of the expense must be clearly displayed on the receipt

issues.description: Date of the expense is missing on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Date of the expense must be clearly visible on the receipt

issues.description: Expense type or description of goods/services purchased is missing on the receipt
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Expense type or description of goods/services purchased must be shown on the receipt

issues.description: Business purpose must be established and clearly documented for all expenses
issues.recommendation: Please provide clear documentation of the business purpose for the expense
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Business purpose must be established and clearly documented for all expenses

issues.description: Expenses must be submitted with clear and legible copies of receipts, properly labeled for identification
issues.recommendation: Please submit clear and legible copies of receipts, properly labeled for identification
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Expenses must be submitted with clear and legible copies of receipts, properly labeled for identification

issues.description: Client line manager approval required before payroll cutoff date
issues.recommendation: Please obtain client line manager approval before the payroll cutoff date
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Client line manager approval required before payroll cutoff date

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is non-compliant due to missing mandatory fields such as supplier name, total amount, date of issue, and expense type description. Additionally, there are missing documentation requirements such as business purpose documentation, clear and legible receipts, and manager approval.

field_citation.source_text: No exact field labels found in the provided markdown text.
field_citation.context: The markdown text does not contain clear field labels or headers that can be matched semantically to common field names.

value_citation.source_text: No exact values found in the provided markdown text that can be matched to common field values.
value_citation.context: The markdown text contains some numbers and symbols, but without clear field labels, it is not possible to determine which values correspond to which fields.
